expected.notes: Entity is an S-corp (not C-corp) with NRA owner; rule requires c_corp so it must not fire despite owner being non-resident.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'advisory_dividend_withholding', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - answers.entity_type eq c_corp
  - answers.owner_residency neq us_citizen_or_pr
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
